ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the score belongs to */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Happiness rank of the country */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the happiness score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the happiness score was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the happiness score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the economic data belongs to */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_life" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family life entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the family life data belongs to */,
  "family_score" REAL /* Family life score of the country */,
  "divorce_rate" REAL /* Divorce rate of the country */,
  "average_family_size" REAL /* Average family size in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_life_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the health data belongs to */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in the country */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate in the country */,
  "healthcare_expenditure" REAL /* Healthcare expenditure in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the freedom data belongs to */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Freedom score of the country */,
  "press_freedom_index" REAL /* Press freedom index of the country */,
  "civil_liberties_score" REAL /* Civil liberties score of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust" (
  "trust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trust factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the trust data belongs to */,
  "corruption_score" REAL /* Government corruption score of the country */,
  "government_effectiveness" REAL /* Government effectiveness score of the country */,
  "rule_of_law" REAL /* Rule of law score of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trust_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the generosity data belongs to */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Generosity score of the country */,
  "charitable_donations" REAL /* Charitable donations in the country */,
  "volunteer_rate" REAL /* Volunteer rate in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dystopia" (
  "dystopia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dystopia residual entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the dystopia residual data belongs to */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Income inequality in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dystopia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dystopia_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
